title: naravelia lobata
intro: Naravelia lobata, also known as the Indian staff vine or the staff vine, is a perennial climber that belongs to the family Celastraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Naravelia lobata include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as cough and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is also used in the form of tinctures and powders in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
